habitat: Lakes; reservoirs; slow flowing rivers; swamps; bays; lagoons; and estuaries
story: Discover the stunning Great Crested Grebe (*Podiceps cristatus*), a member of the diverse Podicipedidae family. Native to Lakes; reservoirs; slow flowing rivers; swamps; bays; lagoons; and estuaries, this bird faces various environmental challenges. Currently classified as Least Concern (LC) on the IUCN Red List, the Great Crested Grebe represents the delicate balance of its native region. Understanding its habitat requirements and distribution is key to effective conservation planning. This species contributes to the richness of avian diversity, and this poster offers an artistic glimpse into its world.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
